caption: A man with a beard, wearing a brown jacket, speaks into an ANI microphone held by an unseen person in an outdoor setting with greenery in the background. He remains the central focus across all frames, gesturing with his hands as he talks. The screen features a news layout from "NEWS 18 इंडिया" with various overlays. Small portrait photos of politicians such as "सब्रत चौधरी," "विजय सिन्हा," "संतोष सुमन," "सुमित कुमार," and "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार" appear in sidebars. The headlines and tickers change throughout the sequence. The first frame reads "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'" and "नीतीश कुमार: अलग हुए थे, अब एकजुट होकर काम करेंगे," while the second reads "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाक़ी है" and "नीतीश कुमार: बिहार के हित के लिए काम करते रहेंगे." The third frame asks "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" and states "नीतीश कुमार: जल्द ही मंत्रिमंडलब का विस्तार होगा." The final frame displays "नीतीश: अब इधर उधर जाने का प्रश्न ही नहीं उठता."
